title: OSF UI
description: Runtime and overlay behavior for the OSF UI framework itself.

settings.label: Open / close key
settings.hint: Press to rebind the key that opens and closes the overlay.

settings.label: Game console key
settings.hint: Passed straight through while the overlay is open, so the game console still opens. Match your console binding; unbind to disable the pass-through.

settings.label: Freeze gameplay controls
settings.hint: Stop player controls (including gamepad) through the engine while the overlay is open.

settings.label: Pause-menu entry
settings.hint: Add a MOD MENUS entry to the game's pause menu.

settings.label: Warn about game-key collisions
settings.hint: Badge mod hotkeys that collide with Starfield's own bindings.
